items.title: Bank of Baroda (BOB) Apprentice Recruitment 2026 — 5,000 Vacancies Out
items.salary: Stipend: Rs. 12,000/- to Rs. 15,000/- per month based on area
items.application_fee: Gen/OBC/EWS: Rs. 800, PwBD: Rs. 400, SC/ST: Nil
items.education: Graduation Degree in any discipline from a recognized University
items.details:
Massive Bank Alert: Bank of Baroda invites online applications for the engagement of 5,000 apprentices under the Apprentices Act, 1961.

Key Highlights:

  • 12 Months of On-the-Job training in a leading public sector bank.
  • Selection is based on an Online Written Exam, Document Verification, and a Local Language Proficiency Test.
  • The online exam consists of 100 questions covering General/Financial Awareness, Quantitative/Reasoning Aptitude, Computer Knowledge, and English with no negative marking.
items.other_details: Age Limit (As on 01-05-2026): 20 to 28 years. Upper age relaxations apply for reserved categories (5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC). Candidates must first register on the government NATS/NAPS portal before applying.

items.title: BRO GREF Recruitment 2026 — 899 Vacancies | Notification Out
items.salary: As per 7th CPC (Level 2 to Level 5) plus special border allowances
items.education: 10th Pass (Matriculation) + ITI Certificate in respective trade
items.details: Border Roads Organisation (BRO) has released Advertisement No. 01/2026 for recruitment across multiple technical trades including Store Keeper Technical (SKT), Operator Communication, Electrician, Draughtsman, Hindi Typist, and Operator Excavating Machinery (OEM). Open for Indian male citizens only.
items.other_details: Age Limit: 18-25 years or 18-27 years depending on trade rules. Selection process includes a physical efficiency test (PET), a trade practice test, and a written examination.

items.title: Oil India Limited (OIL) Recruitment 2026 — 70 Junior Engineer & Assistant Posts
items.education: 10th + ITI Trade Certificate OR 10+2 with Computer Diploma OR Diploma in Engineering
items.details:
Premium Local PSU Opening: Oil India Limited invites applications from eligible candidates for multiple regular positions at its operational areas in Assam.

Key Positions:

  • Junior Office Assistant (33 Posts): Requires 10+2 and 6-month Computer Certificate.
  • Junior Technician (Fitter/Instrument Mechanic/Surveyor): Requires Class 10 + ITI.
  • Junior Engineer Electrical (4 Posts): Requires 3-Year Diploma + Assam Electrical Supervisor Certificate.
items.other_details: Age Limit: 18 to 40 years as of the closing date. Selection relies on a 2-hour and 40-minute Computer-Based Test (CBT) with zero negative marking. Minimum qualifying threshold is 40 marks.

items.title: IBPS RRB CRP XIII (Officer Scale I, II, III & Office Assistant) — 8,500+ Posts
items.other_details: Age varies by post. Prelims, Mains & Interview.
items.details:
Important Update: The online registration for IBPS RRB CRP XIII is officially open.

Key Highlights:

  • Over 8,500 vacancies across multiple banks.
  • Pre-examination training available for eligible candidates.
  • Ensure you have a valid email ID and mobile number for registration.

Please read the official notification carefully before applying.
